creator: kris@FreeBSD.org
text:
Guido Boehm wrote:

>> Description:
> /etc/rc.d/ppp shows the following error while trying to start my "dsl" ppp profile during boot:
> Starting PPP profile: dsl/libexec/ld-elf.so.1: Shared object "libintl.so.8" not
> found, required by "su"

FreeBSD does not include libintl, and I can't see how su can end up 
being linked to it.  What changes have you made to your system?

Kris
